parameters.content:
## onchain-verify (daily)
Health check on onchain.snapshots → Telegram report (chat 207209924).
Checks: freshness (max(ts) < 2h stale per metric), orphans=0, metrics seen vs registered, row/bucket counts. Owner: onchain-intel.

parameters.query:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT metric, max(ts) AS max_ts FROM onchain.snapshots GROUP BY metric
)
SELECT
  (SELECT count(*) FROM onchain.snapshots) AS total_rows,
  (SELECT count(DISTINCT ts_bucket) FROM onchain.snapshots) AS buckets,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM onchain.metrics) AS metrics_registered,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM latest) AS metrics_seen,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM latest WHERE max_ts < (extract(epoch from now())*1000)::bigint - 7200000) AS stale_metrics,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM onchain.snapshots s LEFT JOIN onchain.assets a ON s.asset=a.id LEFT JOIN onchain.metrics m ON s.metric=m.id WHERE a.id IS NULL OR m.id IS NULL) AS orphans,
  (SELECT to_char(to_timestamp(max(ts)/1000) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') FROM onchain.snapshots) AS latest_ts_utc;
